/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -Os -g -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,libns3.45-traffic-control-test-default.so -o /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-traffic-control-test-default.so "CMakeFiles/traffic-control-test.dir/test/adaptive-red-queue-disc-test-suite.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/traffic-control-test.dir/test/cobalt-queue-disc-test-suite.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/traffic-control-test.dir/test/codel-queue-disc-test-suite.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/traffic-control-test.dir/test/fifo-queue-disc-test-suite.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/traffic-control-test.dir/test/pie-queue-disc-test-suite.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/traffic-control-test.dir/test/prio-queue-disc-test-suite.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/traffic-control-test.dir/test/queue-disc-traces-test-suite.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/traffic-control-test.dir/test/red-queue-disc-test-suite.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/traffic-control-test.dir/test/tbf-queue-disc-test-suite.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/traffic-control-test.dir/test/tc-flow-control-test-suite.cc.o"   -L/home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib -Wl,--no-as-needed /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-traffic-control-default.so /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-network-default.so -Wl,--as-needed /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-stats-default.so /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-core-default.so -Wl,--no-as-needed -Wl,--as-needed
